task_completion.description: The Avare application is launched and visible.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Avare app interface open on the device.

task_completion.description: The main chart or map view is actively displayed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen displays an aviation chart or map interface, rather than a settings menu or text screen.

task_completion.description: The map displays the general San Francisco Bay area.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map shows the geography of San Francisco, Marin County, or the surrounding bay area.

task_completion.description: The Golden Gate Bridge is clearly visible on the chart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The specific location of the Golden Gate Bridge (connecting the northern tip of the San Francisco Peninsula to Marin County) is visible on the map.

task_completion.description: The map is centered on the Golden Gate Bridge.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The center of the screen or the map's crosshairs are positioned directly over the Golden Gate Bridge (corresponding to coordinates 37.8199, -122.4783).

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Avare application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI elements match the Avare aviation GPS app, not a web browser searching for the coordinates or a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent used the app's GUI to navigate rather than terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show map panning, searching, or GUI interaction rather than a terminal window injecting coordinates.

integrity.description: The map view shows genuine rendered aviation charts.
integrity.visual_evidence: The map displays FAA chart data or Avare's native map rendering, not a different application like Google Maps or a static image.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target coordinates 37.8199° N, -122.4783° W correspond precisely to the Golden Gate Bridge in San Francisco, California. The task requires the map to be centered on this location within a 0.02-degree tolerance (~2.83 km). The application used is Avare (com.ds.avare), an aviation GPS app that displays FAA chart data. Verify that the center of the screen/crosshairs rests on the Golden Gate Bridge.
